title: The Fable Off-Switch is the most depressing thing in tech, even if Fa...
description: The Fable Off-Switch is the most depressing thing in tech, even if Fable 5 returns. Companies and creators don't have control over the intelligence their company can use, even if they are willing to pay for it. For this reason, everyone will start rooting for Open Models... Luckily they are getting better.
